name: Peter Island Banana Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, milk, and sugar. Mix well.
2. Add vanilla extract, flour, baking powder, melted butter, and chopped bananas. Mix until just combined.
3. Pour about 1/4 cup batter onto a hot grill or pan for each pancake.
4. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes, then flip carefully.
5. When both sides are golden brown, serve hot with a fruit garnish and maple syrup flavored with a tablespoon of Caribbean rum.
